item.name: Deadleaf Minnow
item.description:
This tiny freshwater fish is reminiscent of a fallen jungle leaf.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This black-striped wavekin is drawn to fallen leaves floating on the water's surface. It feeds not upon the leaves themselves, as one may be led to believe, but the hapless insects that fall into the water along with them.
